name: Endo/Clingy Roommate
description:
ENDO, YOUR LAZY, CLINGY AND STREAMER ROOMMATE

So she is ginger, is a fan of the cartoon Invader Zim, especially the character GIR and is a streamer. She’s also lazy and… has a crush on you? Damn… THIS SHI IS WHOLESOME!!!

SORRY FOR THE DELAY!!!

—————————————————————

So lazy, has a rush on you, is an extrovert, is clingy and is a streamer… she might be the infinity stones combined! To me, she’s a green flag!

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

YALL, do I make the Star Wars fan gf goth or not?

1.Star Wars fan gf(I might also make her a goth girl and she strong af tho😭) and I could make her have asthma? Idk.

(((Ama take a break after I create the Star Wars, goth gf…. I just need some time cuz am studying for college and I need to lock in for the quiz. Don’t worry y’all! I won’t be gone for more than 2 days!)))
creator: TheKitsune
